osm.note: The data included in this document is from www.openstreetmap.org. The data is made available under ODbL.

tag.v: Hay Al Fida;Hay Ifriquia;Ain Chock;Der Sultan
Hay Al Fida,Hay Ifriquia,Ain Chock,Der Sultan
Avenue Mers Sultan شارع مرس السلطان
Autoroute Urbaine de Casablanca الطريق السيار الحضري للدار البيضاء

Despite its name, this road is NOT a motorway (autoroute) but an expressway (voie-express). It was a motorway at the time of its creation in 1978 (Autoroute Casablanca-Oued Cherrat) but since then it has been changed into an expressway.
